description:
# Scheduler REST API

Add REST endpoint exposing SchedulerService status so the UI can fetch health data without MCP. Foundation for the health dashboard — all downstream milestones depend on this endpoint existing.

## Phases
1. Scheduler Status Endpoint
title: [Epic] Scheduler REST API
